key_moments.description: Police discover the infant deceased in a bassinet, initially mistaken for a doll.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: In the corner of the room, in a small bassinet, officers saw what they assumed was a baby doll. But the truth was far more devastating.

key_moments.description: Surviving 2-year-old found alive but severely malnourished in a crib.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: Miraculously, she was still alive, though she could barely stand. The toddler appeared severely malnourished.

key_moments.description: Friend Sophia disputes the existence of the sitter 'KK'.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: I don't believe there's a sitter... She's a liar. There was no sitter.

key_moments.description: Grandparents reveal they contacted CPS, but were told it was a 'low-risk' situation.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: The person that's the case manager went over saw the apartment and he he tells us that well there's not much that we can do

key_moments.description: Kylia attempts to record her own arrest, leading to a confrontation with the deputy.
key_moments.transcript_excerpt: I was coming to surrender myself... I do deserve the right to have my own video

content_pitch: The video opens with a chilling 911 call and bodycam footage of officers discovering a deceased infant initially mistaken for a doll, immediately hooking viewers with visceral stakes. The narrative pivots on a devastating contradiction: the mother’s claim of a babysitter collapses when detectives reveal the alleged sitter was incarcerated at the time of the death. With raw interrogation footage, a surviving malnourished toddler, and a tense arrest confrontation, this case delivers a tightly wound, emotionally charged arc that perfectly aligns with our highest-performing cold-open structure.

_pipeline4_metadata.reasoning_summary: The case scores a 73.3 narrative score with a 100% arc similarity to our top-performing cold-open pattern and a complete artifact stack including bodycam, 911 audio, and interrogation. It features multiple critical reveals and a central contradiction that dismantles the suspect's alibi, easily clearing all PRODUCE thresholds.
